meta.title: NDE Heritage Viewer
meta.description: View a heritage object as linked data according to SCHEMA-AP-NDE. A prototype of the Dutch Digital Heritage Network.

page.intro: See what a heritage object looks like as linked data, based on a sector-wide standard. Paste a (perma)link to a heritage object and press the View button, or pick one of the examples.
page.placeholder: https://… permalink of a heritage object

footer.body: Prototype (source code on <github>Github</github>) that shows linked data straight from the source; it displays only the fields it recognises according to <profile>SCHEMA-AP-NDE (version 1.1.0)</profile>, terms via the <terms>NDE Network of Terms</terms> and dataset descriptions via the <register>NDE Dataset Register</register>.

errors.INVALID_URL: Please enter a valid http(s) permalink.
errors.NO_URIS: Provide at least one term URI.
errors.TERM_LOOKUP_FAILED: Looking up the term in the Network of Terms failed.
errors.NETWORK: The request could not be completed.

field.datasetNoLinkedData: ⚠ This dataset URI returned no linked data.
field.datasetRegister: View in the NDE Dataset Register ↗
field.iiifNote: IIIF manifest present — see the viewer above.

diagnostics.title: Checks
diagnostics.missingLangTags: Text values without a language tag

term.title: Network of Terms
term.none: No information found in the Network of Terms for this URI.
